targets.query:
from(bucket: "pencil_line")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pencil_line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "produced_total" or r._field == "good_total" or r._field == "defective_total")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "pencil_line")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pencil_line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "pencil_line")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pencil_line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state_value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "state")

panels.title: Machine State Value: 0 Stop, 1 Run, 2 Fault

targets.query:
from(bucket: "pencil_line")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pencil_line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_station_index")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "station")
